description: Celebrate and enhance your feminity with these absolutely stunning and comfortable sandals from catwalk. With it's vibrant colours and sleek design, this pair is perfect for everyday casual wear. Upper Synthetic leather thong straps Synthetic leather floral embellishment across the thong straps for traction and style Outsole TPR outsole with floral grooves for enhanced grip and traction Sandal care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
